channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hackers Are Posting the Claude Code Leak With Bonus Malware
item.description: Plus: The FBI says a recent hack of its wiretap tools poses a national security risk, attackers stole Cisco source code as part of an ongoing supply chain hacking spree, and more.

item.title: Pourquoi la Nintendo Switch 2 cache en fait un port SSD qui ne dit pas son nom
item.description: On savait que la Switch 2 passait au microSD Express, mais on n'avait pas encore mesuré l'ampleur du potentiel. Le moddeur Mizuyoukan a réussi un bel exploit : brancher un SSD NVMe standard directement sur le port de la console.

item.title: Trump Wants to Start Privatizing TSA in Latest Budget Proposal
item.description: "The Budget begins the privatization of TSA’s airport screeners...."

item.title: Lost Warship From Battle of Copenhagen Found After 225 Years
item.description: Within the shipwreck lay cannons, shoes, personal belongings, and bones of soldiers who went down with their ship.

item.title: These One-of-a-Kind Objects Are in the Wrong Museums
item.description: Can anyone "own" the past?

item.title: How to Get Reliable Wi-Fi in Your Backyard
item.description: There are several ways to extend your Wi-Fi network into your backyard and out onto the deck or patio. Here’s how.

item.title: Sivga's winsome wired headphones look the part but, in testing, I found the bass was a bulging mess of directionless energy
item.description: The Sivga Robin SV021 Pro are wired over-ear headphones that punch above their budget, just about, but the bass is a mess.

item.title: Spotify’s SongDNA is like a musical Wikipedia on steroids — I just can't stop using it
item.description: I haven't stopped using SongDNA since Spotify released it — this is how my first hands-on with the feature went.

item.title: 'It's going to get darker': The Gentlemen season 2 star confirms new episodes are 'finished' — but even more unhinged
item.description: The Gentlemen season 2 will return to Netflix later this year — and its lead star has confirmed that the new episodes are even 'darker'.

item.title: This turbulence-tracking travel app will make your next trip more tolerable
item.description: Turbli tells you exactly what to expect for any specific flight at every moment along the way—from takeoff through landing. When we talk about travel apps, we typically talk about the types of tools that help you organize your itineraries, find worthwhile stops along your way, or maybe even just find flights (and/or fuel!) in the first place.

item.title: Managing AI has become its own job
item.description: AI was supposed to save time. Instead, many workers are bogged down with prompting, checking, and fixing flawed output. Managers are rushing to deploy AI for efficiency gains. Employees have to figure out how to make it work—and that’s sometimes harder than it seems.

item.title: Why Gen Z is fangirling over Apple’s ‘Finder Guy’ mascot
item.description: Everyone loves Apple’s new TikTok mascot—and for good reason. At first, he appeared in the top corner of a multi-slide TikTok post. Then he was spotted demurely relaxing in a lawn chair on a livestream. Finally, on March 30, Apple’s new mascot, nicknamed “Finder Guy,” made his debut—and the internet has instantly become enamored with him.

item.title: J’ai testé la Xiaomi Watch 5, une montre Wear OS plutôt accessible et à l’autonomie impressionnante
item.description: Avec sa Xiaomi Watch 5, le constructeur chinois propose une montre connectée sous Wear OS, mais avec une belle promesse d'autonomie en plus des nombreuses applications compatibles. Voici son test complet.

item.title: The Trajectory of the Artemis II Moon Mission Is a Feat of Engineering
item.description: The astronauts will arrive about 10,300 kilometers beyond our satellite, breaking all previous records for distance from Earth. But how was their route chosen?

item.title: Verizon's latest deals include the Galaxy S26 Ultra, S26 Plus, iPhone 17e, and Google Pixel 10a — all free with a new line
item.description: If you'd rather skip the trade-in rebates, this week's new Verizon deals are a real treat — here's what I'd recommend.

item.title: Cette étoile âgée de 200 ans « éternue » – les astronomes peinent encore à l’expliquer
item.description: Dis papa, comment on fait des étoiles ? C’est la question à laquelle les astronomes rêvent de pouvoir répondre. Des observations inédites montrent en tout cas qu’elles « éternuent » du gaz et de l’énergie dans leurs tout premiers instants. Mais pourquoi ?

item.title: Dreame A2 : l’un des robots tondeuses les plus avancés du moment est à moitié prix
item.description: Avec son dôme LiDAR, sa caméra IA embarquée et son plateau de coupe motorisé pour atteindre les bordures, le Dreame A2 se range clairement parmi les robots tondeuses les plus complets du moment. Actuellement, Boulanger, Darty et la Fnac le proposent d'ailleurs à 1 299 euros au lieu de 2 500 euros.

item.title: 'Growing 3x faster than police staffing': Surge in cybercrime and new laws on ransomware payment could put UK businesses (and their directors) — in a "compliance trap."
item.description: Cybercrime in the UK is rising faster than policing capacity, while stricter laws increase compliance risks for businesses facing ransomware attacks.

item.title: The Roborock Saros 20 handily beats 2025s Saros 10R. But hopefully, the Saros 20 Sonic is even better.
item.description: The Roborock Saros 20 is smarter and more powerful than the 10R, and costs the same $1,599.99. But it's not automatically the best of 2026.

item.title: On a testé un taxi autonome sans conducteur en Chine, et on ne s’attendait pas à ça
item.description: Dans les rues foisonnantes et hyperconnectées de Shenzhen, j'ai tenté l'expérience singulière de commander un taxi sans l'ombre d'un chauffeur au volant. Une incursion au cœur du futur imminent de la mobilité urbaine, intégralement orchestrée par l'intelligence artificielle et truffée de capteurs de pointe.

item.title: The Boat Race live stream 2026: how to watch Oxford vs Cambridge rowing online, schedule, start time, streaming guide
item.description: Oxford take on Cambridge in Britain's most infamous university sport, here's how to watch 2026 Boat Race live streams from anywhere.

item.title: I'm gutted Apple's dropped my favorite iPhone feature, but it might return this year
item.description: Rumors circulating around the iPhone Fold suggest the best hardware feature I think Apple’s introduced on the iPhone is about to make a comeback.

item.title: 3 surprising (but simple) ways to save gas as fuel costs skyrocket
item.description: Should you drive faster, or slower? Turn off the A/C? Take stuff out of the back seat and trunk? We have answers that will save you money at the pump. We’re in the middle of the extended Easter holiday weekend, which usually sees millions of Americans taking long road trips to visit family or just get away. But this year, these trips will probably be more costly—at least at the pump. Still, there are steps you can take while driving to save fuel and reduce your overall gas bill....

item.title: Review: I tried the new Sonos Play speaker, part of the audio companys big comeback
item.description: Sonos Play is the company's new portable speaker, sitting in between the massive Move 2 and the smaller Roam 2. We've spent a week with it so far.

item.title: Anthropic makes the case for anthropomorphizing AI in ‘unsettling’ research paper
item.description: In the AI community, there's a long-held taboo against anthropomorphizing AI. In a new research paper, Anthropic argues that maybe we should.

item.title: The quirky stuff NASA packed in the Orion spaceship for Artemis II
item.description: NASA's Artemis II lunar flyby mission is carrying mementos on the 10-day journey around the moon in the Orion spacecraft.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to qualify
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you trade in an eligible device and sign up for the Experience More plan.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro drone is down to its best-ever price at Amazon — save $500 this weekend
item.description: The DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo is on sale for $1,099 at Amazon. That's the record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: Your AI stack, simplified (and way cheaper)
item.description: Get lifetime access to 1min.AI’s all-in-one platform for $99.99 and streamline everything from writing to video creation in one place.

item.title: Here’s a smarter way to use Word, Excel, and other Office favorites — now for $150 off
item.description: Enjoy Microsoft Office apps with AI capabilities thanks to this Microsoft Office 2024 Home and Business lifetime license.

item.title: Here’s a budget-friendly way to own a MacBook Pro that saves you over $1,500
item.description: Bring home a MacBook Pro for only $429.97 (reg. $1,999) now through April 19.

item.title: See You When I See You review: Jay Duplass latest drama is hurt by his leading man
item.description: Jay Duplass' latest drama, "See You When I See You," is hurt by his leading man. Review.

item.title: That wild Scarpetta ending, explained
item.description: Who's at the door in the final moments of "Scarpetta" and who is the killer?

item.title: The best gay dating apps of 2026: Grindr is still king (even if we sometimes wish it wasnt)
item.description: From Grindr to Scruff to Archer, here's our unfiltered guide to the best gay dating apps.

item.title: Man City vs Liverpool Live Streams: How to Watch FA Cup Quarter-Final 2025/26 Online From Anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Man City vs Liverpool in the FA Cup quarter-final, with the home side seeking to book another trip to Wembley Stadium.
